title: Luffy Wants Chopper to Join — Part 6
description: On pages 19–19, luffy wants chopper to join — part 6 as nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him.
scene: Luffy Wants Chopper to Join — Part 6. Nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: those scum dare think they can defy me!?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: that person was Dr. Hilluluk, a man who once lived here in drum kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
